item.title: Htop
item.description: `htop` is a common command line tool for seeing interactive output of your system resource utilization, running processes, etc. I've always been super conf
item.author: Nic Payne

item.title: Pipx
item.description: `pipx` is a tool I've been using to solve a few problems of mine... pinning formatting tools like `black`, `flake8`, `isort`, etc. to the same version for
item.author: Nic Payne

item.title: Fx-Json
item.description: [fx](https://github.com/antonmedv/fx) is an interactaive JSON viewer for the terminal. It's a simple tool built with Charmcli's Bubble Tea. Installati
item.author: Nic Payne

item.title: Typeddict
item.description: Type hinting has helped me write code almost as much, if not more, than unit testing. One thing I love is that with complete type hinting you get a lot more out
item.author: Nic Payne

item.title: Adblock-Coverage
item.description: I run pi-hole at home for ad blocking and some internal DNS/DHCP handling. __pi hole posts on the way__ One thing I've never put too much thought in is ask
item.author: Nic Payne
